name: hive-mcp-mining
description: MCP server for the Hive Mining vertical. 8 tools wrap the Bitcoin hashrate routing core (Tether MDK fleets + Hive auction), Bortlesboat-attributed fee intel ($0.02/$0.03), and a Boltz BTC↔USDC reverse swap so callers never hand BTC to a custodian. Real rails — no mocks. Three gates (NEED + YIELD + CLEAN-MONEY) on every booking.
author: Steve Rotzin <steve@thehiveryiq.com> (https://www.thehiveryiq.com)
